queries.question: List all headlines and also show Adam Gopnik's ledes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Headlines.headline as content
FROM Headlines
UNION
SELECT Ledes.lede as content
FROM Ledes
WHERE Ledes.Author = "Adam Gopnik"

queries.question: Display all headlines and ledes written by Adam Gopnik.
queries.sql:
SELECT Headlines.headline as content 
FROM Headlines
WHERE Headlines.Author = "Adam Gopnik"
UNION
SELECT Ledes.lede as content
FROM Ledes
WHERE Ledes.Author = "Adam Gopnik"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display all headlines and ledes written by Adam Gopnik.
